meaning: n.凡俗化,还俗,把教育从宗教中分离
examples: During those years, several things happened, primarily linguistic or thematic and both involving secularization.
But secularization of modernity society made the two prerequisites impossibility.
The prevalence of the secularization of the monks were determined by many factors.
Ravi Zacharias cites three worrisome trends: Secularization resulting in the loss of stigma around anti-social behavior.
